title: CSMCRI Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Associate I Posts
description: The Central Salt & Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSIR CSMCRI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Project Associate I Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech in Mechanical Engineering, M.Sc can apply for the CSMCRI Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have men...
